flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Concorde Career College-Kansas City fell 70% between 2021 and 2024 (668 → 198).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 55% at Concorde Career College-Kansas City vs the 2018–2022 baseline (240 vs 536).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Concorde Career College-Kansas City fell 26% between 2018 and 2019 (54.5% → 40.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Concorde Career College-Kansas City fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (61.4% → 52.9%).
